 {"id":"bd-qqc","title":"Release v{{version}}","description":"Version bump workflow for beads release {{version}}.

## Variables
- `{{version}}` - The new version number (e.g., 0.31.0)
- `{{date}}` - Release date (YYYY-MM-DD format)

## Workflow Steps
1. Kill running daemons
2. Run tests and linting
3. Bump version in all files (10 files total)
4. Update cmd/bd/info.go with release notes
5. Commit and push version bump
6. Create and push git tag
7. Update Homebrew formula
8. Upgrade local Homebrew installation
9. Verify installation

## Files Updated by bump-version.sh
- cmd/bd/version.go
- .claude-plugin/plugin.json
- .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
- integrations/beads-mcp/pyproject.toml
- integrations/beads-mcp/src/beads_mcp/__init__.py
- README.md
- npm-package/package.json
- cmd/bd/templates/hooks/* (4 files)
- CHANGELOG.md

## Manual Step Required
- cmd/bd/info.go - Add versionChanges entry with release notes","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2025-12-18T12:59:00.610371-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-20T17:59:26.263219-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-20T01:18:46.71424-08:00","labels":["template"]}

+{"id":"bd-qqc.10","title":"Upgrade local Homebrew installation","description":"Upgrade bd via Homebrew:

```bash
brew update
brew upgrade bd
/opt/homebrew/bin/bd version  # Verify shows {{version}}
```

**Note**: If `brew upgrade` fails with CLT (Command Line Tools) errors on bleeding-edge macOS versions (e.g., Tahoe 26.x):

```bash
# Reinstall CLT
sudo rm -rf /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools
xcode-select --install
# Wait for GUI installer to complete, then retry brew upgrade
```

Alternative: Skip Homebrew and use go install:
```bash
go install ./cmd/bd
~/go/bin/bd version  # Verify shows {{version}}
```","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-18T22:42:37.60241-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T12:32:23.678806-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-18T22:52:00.331429-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-qqc.10","depends_on_id":"bd-qqc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-18T22:42:37.603893-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-qqc.10","depends_on_id":"bd-qqc.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-18T22:43:21.458817-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}

+{"id":"bd-qqc.9","title":"Update Homebrew formula","description":"Update the Homebrew tap with new version:

```bash
./scripts/update-homebrew.sh {{version}}
```

This script waits for GitHub Actions to complete (~5 min), then updates the formula with new SHA256 hashes.

**⚠️ KNOWN BUG (bd-oryk)**: The awk script in update-homebrew.sh corrupts the formula by removing platform conditionals. After running, verify the formula with:

```bash
brew info steveyegge/beads/bd
```

If you see syntax errors, manually fix the formula at:
`/opt/homebrew/Library/Taps/steveyegge/homebrew-beads/Formula/bd.rb`

Then push the fix:
```bash
cd /opt/homebrew/Library/Taps/steveyegge/homebrew-beads
git add Formula/bd.rb && git commit -m "Fix formula syntax" && git push origin main
```","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-18T22:42:35.815096-08:00","updated_at":"2025-12-22T12:32:12.840405-08:00","closed_at":"2025-12-18T22:51:07.863862-08:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-qqc.9","depends_on_id":"bd-qqc","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2025-12-18T22:42:35.816752-08:00","created_by":"daemon"},{"issue_id":"bd-qqc.9","depends_on_id":"bd-qqc.8","type":"blocks","created_at":"2025-12-18T22:43:21.332955-08:00","created_by":"daemon"}]}
 {"id":"bd-r2n1","title":"Add integration tests for RPC server and event loops","description":"After adding basic unit tests for daemon utilities, the complex daemon functions still need integration tests:

Core daemon lifecycle:
- startRPCServer: Initializes and starts RPC server with proper error handling
- runEventLoop: Polling-based sync loop with parent monitoring and signal handling
- runDaemonLoop: Main daemon initialization and setup

Health checking:
- isDaemonHealthy: Checks daemon responsiveness and health metrics
- checkDaemonHealth: Periodic health verification

These require more complex test infrastructure (mock RPC, test contexts, signal handling) and should be tackled after the unit test foundation is in place.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2025-12-18T12:28:56.022996362-07:00","updated_at":"2025-12-18T12:44:32.167862713-07:00","closed_at":"2025-12-18T12:44:32.167862713-07:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-r2n1","depends_on_id":"bd-4or","type":"discovered-from","created_at":"2025-12-18T12:28:56.045893852-07:00","created_by":"mhwilkie"}]}
